query: TVPA attorney fees standard of review abuse of discretion ca2

results.holding: Affirmed fee award under TVPA; court applied abuse of discretion standard to overall award and de novo to legal questions embedded in fee determination.
key_quotes: We review an award of attorneys' fees under the TVPA for abuse of discretion, reversing only if the district court applied incorrect legal standards or made clearly erroneous factual findings.
The district court's determination of what constitutes a reasonable fee is itself reviewed for abuse of discretion.

results.holding: Addressed TVPA liability; fee award discussed in dicta — standard of review not explicitly stated but applied abuse of discretion consistent with Sabbithi.
Unpublished. Fee award under TVPA affirmed under abuse of discretion standard.
key_quotes: Consistent with our precedent, we review the district court's fee award for abuse of discretion.
